title: Limitations
full_text:
6.4.1.2 Limitations
Limitations
1) Notwithstanding use of the performance path, all service water heating
appliances and equipment shall comply with the applicable appliance or equipment
energy efficiency act or, in the absence of such an act or where the appliance or
equipment is not covered by such an act, with the applicable performance standard.
2) This Section does not apply to back-up SWH systems, which shall comply
with Sentence 6.1.1.3.(2).

sentences.text: Notwithstanding use of the performance path, all service water heating appliances and equipment shall comply with the applicable appliance or equipment energy efficiency act or, in the absence of such an act or where the appliance or equipment is not covered by such an act, with the applicable performance standard.
This Section does not apply to back-up SWH systems, which shall comply with Sentence 6.1.1.3.(2).
